name: @e-onux/trellis-web
description: Trellis landing + wizard. Static site that reuses @e-onux/trellis-core's compose engine to generate a tailored AI spec, an npx command, or a .zip starter.

scripts.serve: node build.mjs && node -e "import('node:http').then(({createServer})=>{import('node:fs').then(fs=>{import('node:path').then(path=>{const root='dist';createServer((q,s)=>{let p=path.join(root,decodeURIComponent(q.url.split('?')[0]));if(q.url==='/')p=path.join(root,'index.html');try{const b=fs.readFileSync(p);const ext=path.extname(p);const ct={'.html':'text/html','.css':'text/css','.js':'text/javascript','.json':'application/json'}[ext]||'text/plain';s.writeHead(200,{'content-type':ct});s.end(b);}catch{s.writeHead(404);s.end('not found');}}).listen(4321,()=>console.log('http://localhost:4321'))})})})"
